name: Prompt Submission

---

## Prompt Name

> e.g., "Socratic Tutor" or "API Error Explainer"

## Category

> Which folder does this belong in? (coding / business / writing / research / openai / anthropic / etc.)

## Technique

> e.g., Role Prompting, Chain-of-Thought, Few-Shot, RAG, etc.

## Source / Inspiration

> Link to the paper, documentation, or blog post this is based on. If original, say "Original."

## Description

> One sentence describing what this prompt does and when to use it.

## The Prompt

```
[Paste your full prompt here]
```

## Example Input

```
[Example input that works well with this prompt]
```

## Example Output

```
[Expected or actual output for the example above]
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The prompt does not facilitate harm, deception, or illegal activity
- [ ] The prompt does not contain real personal data (PII)
- [ ] I have credited the original source
- [ ] I have tested this prompt and it works as described
- [ ] The format follows the existing `.md` frontmatter style in this repo
